cards.text:
CALL MOM

Say:
"I just needed to get this off my chest.
____ is not ____'s father.
It's ____."

CALL YOUR BEST FRIEND

Say:
"I need more clothes.
I sharted.
I am in the _____ bathroom."

CALL YOUR EX

Say:
"Did you call the police on me?
Because they are at my door."

CALL THE LAST NUMBER YOU CALLED

Say:
"Quick question.
What are the last 4 digits of your Social Security number?"

CALL THE LAST PERSON YOU TEXTED

Say:
"I'm in the drive-thru at Wendy's.
I don't have any money.
Can you screenshot your debit card front and back?"

CALL MOM

Say:
"Did the condom break?"

CALL THE 3RD TO THE LAST PERSON WHO CALLED YOU

Say:
"I had a dream we got married.
Do you want to get married?"

CALL THE LAST PERSON YOU TEXTED

Say:
"Can you Cash App me $50?
I need to buy some herb."

CALL THE FIRST PERSON YOU TEXTED YESTERDAY

Say:
"Can you Instacart me some tampons?"

CALL WEST END SDA CHURCH
404-755-5927
OR ST MARY'S CATHOLIC CHURCH
847-888-2828

Say:
"As a new member, can I use Carlo Rossi wine when communion is given?"

🃏 WILD

Say:
"I think I left my blue underwear in your glove box."

OR DOUBLE SHOT

❤️ I LOVE YOU

Can I come get the other 4?"

Can y'all make a 12-inch penis in the shape of a pizza, with pepperoni for the nuts?"

OR LM FITNESS CENTER 323-660-0050

🃏 WILD

THE PERSON TO YOUR LEFT MUST TAKE A DOUBLE SHOT

❤️ I LOVE YOU

1-800-888-4848

Say only:
"I LOVE YOU"

TEXT YOUR EX

"911 🚨 ICE looking for you.
I didn't tell them nothing 🤐"

TEXT THE 3RD PERSON YOU TEXTED YESTERDAY

"Don't play with me no more 😑
Next time I won't be laughing.
If he calls you looking for me, you haven't seen me all year."

TEXT THE LAST PERSON YOU TEXTED

"You need to stop lying so much.
People are starting to notice 👀"

TEXT YOUR COUSIN

"I got 10 lbs of greens in the tub.
They about to be FYE tonight 🔥
Come thru and have some."

TEXT THE GROUP CHAT

"FBI took my phone 😳
DELETE ALL THE MESSAGES!!"

TEXT YOUR SIBLING

"I was the one who stole your pillowcase.
Don't ask why.
Just wash it 😬"

TEXT THE SECOND FROM LAST PERSON YOU TEXTED

"I'm on a blind date and forgot to put on deodorant.
I'm musty AF 🤢
I'm around the corner.
Can you run me some deodorant?"

TEXT YOUR CRUSH OR YOUR EX

"Wow...
So we're just not talking about what happened in the bathroom? 😶"

TEXT THE FIRST PERSON YOU TEXTED ON SUNDAY

"If a guy named Dock calls, tell him we go together 😏"

TEXT THE LAST PERSON WHO TEXTED YOU

"I forgot to tell you...
Everything I told you was a lie.
Sorry 😬"

🃏 WILD

Now I have the shitz 💩"

Say:
"I used your toothbrush last time I was there.
Mine fell on the floor and I panicked." 😳

I wouldn't have taken it if I didn't need it." 😬

TEXT THE LAST PERSON WHO TEXTED YOU

"I'm scared now...
The condom broke inside 😭"

POST:

"There is nothing wrong with peeing in the shower or the tub.
WTF 😐"

Say:

You got any gas pills?" 💨

CALL THE LAST PERSON WHO CALLED YOU

Say:
"When the police asked questions...
I gave them your name first." 🤫

TEXT THE SECOND FROM LAST PERSON YOU TEXTED

Sorry 😭"

🃏 WILD

LIVE TWERK

TWERK FOR 60 SECONDS ON THE PERSON TO YOUR RIGHT'S LIVE

1-800-746-7287

Say:

Now people say they smell fish when I'm around.
Is that normal?"

CALL SPORT CLIPS
1-800-872-4247

Say:
"I need a pubic fade.
It's like a wolf down there.
Do you cut pubes?"

CALL THE LAST NUMBER YOU CALLED

Say:
"Remember when you said, 'Clean it up'?
Well, now we both need alibis."

POST:

"WOW.
My daddy is really my brother.
WTF!"

CALL HOME DEPOT
1-800-466-3337

Say:
"Do y'all carry dirty hoes?
I need a hoe that can handle herself."

TEXT THE LAST PERSON WHO TEXTED YOU

"Do not call or text me EVER!!!!"

🃏 WILD

866-819-7414
